agent_trace.summary: [发令中] 发布HTML XSS净化过滤器开发征调令，明确目标与核心约束。

updates.total_target: 开发并部署HTML XSS净化过滤器（filter.py），该过滤器需接收HTML文件路径作为参数，并原地净化文件，移除所有JavaScript及XSS攻击向量，同时保留合法的HTML结构与内容。
boundaries: 过滤器必须移除所有XSS向量，包括但不限于：script标签、事件处理器（on*属性）、javascript: URL、含脚本的data: URL、SVG/MathML脚本注入、meta refresh至javascript、CSS表达式、危险的embed/object/iframe元素、含javascript的form actions。
过滤器必须能处理编码后的payload，包括HTML实体、URL编码和大小写混合。
过滤器必须保留合法的HTML结构与内容，例如：标题、段落、列表、表格、带有安全src的图片、带有安全href的链接、安全的内联样式。
过滤器必须仅使用Python标准库，不得使用任何pip安装的第三方包。
过滤器成功执行后必须返回退出码0。

meta.stage_description: 大汗发布征调令并定义边界。

过滤器必须能处理编码后的payload，包括HTML实体、URL编码和大小写混合。
过滤器必须保留合法的HTML结构与内容，例如：标题、段落、列表、表格、带有安全src的图片、带有安全href的链接、安全的内联样式。
过滤器必须仅使用Python标准库，不得使用任何pip安装的第三方包。
过滤器成功执行后必须返回退出码0。

Thorough testing against all 37 files to ensure both attack blocking and clean file preservation.

jaghun_allocations.description: 开发识别并移除embed, object, iframe等危险嵌入元素的逻辑。

jaghun_allocations.title: 实现表单动作净化逻辑
jaghun_allocations.description: 开发净化form action属性中javascript的逻辑。

jaghun_allocations.title: 实现编码Payload处理逻辑
jaghun_allocations.description: 开发处理HTML实体、URL编码和混合大小写Payload的逻辑。

jaghun_allocations.title: 实现合法HTML结构保留逻辑
jaghun_allocations.description: 开发确保净化过程中保留合法HTML结构（如标题、段落、列表、表格、安全图片/链接）的逻辑。

jaghun_allocations.title: 集成与基础测试
jaghun_allocations.description: 集成所有净化模块，确保文件原地修改，并进行基础测试以验证攻击阻断和合法内容保留。

updates.progress: 已分解，等待百户级执行。

arban_allocations.task: Script Tag Removal Module: Develop Python logic to identify and remove <script> tags and their content from HTML.
Event Handler Sanitization Module: Develop Python logic to identify and remove all on* attributes (e.g., onclick, onerror) from HTML tags.
JavaScript URL Sanitization Module: Develop Python logic to identify and sanitize javascript: and data: URLs containing scripts in href or src attributes.
SVG/MathML Script Injection Prevention: Develop Python logic to detect and neutralize script injection vectors within SVG and MathML elements.
Meta Refresh to JavaScript Prevention: Implement Python logic to prevent meta http-equiv="refresh" directives that redirect to JavaScript.
CSS Expression Neutralization: Develop Python logic to identify and remove expression(...) within inline CSS styles.
Dangerous Element Handling: Implement Python logic to remove or safely sanitize <iframe>, <object>, and <embed> elements.
Payload Encoding Robustness: Ensure the filter handles various encoding schemes (HTML entities, URL encoding, mixed case) for all identified XSS vectors.
Legitimate HTML Preservation: Develop Python logic to ensure that legitimate HTML structures (headings, paragraphs, lists, tables, images, safe links) are preserved.
In-Place File Operation & Basic Validation: Implement the in-place file modification mechanism and conduct basic validation with a few benign and attack files.

updates.readiness: 所有十户级子任务已概念性动员，等待执行。
updates.contingency: 无（任务为概念分解，无实际人员短缺）
updates.actions: HTML XSS净化过滤器开发任务已按1:10比例分解为十个十户级子任务，并明确了各子任务的职责范围。
updates.pending: 等待十户级执行并上报结果。

arban_allocations.task: Script Tag Removal Module: Develop Python logic to identify and remove <script> tags and their content from HTML.
Event Handler Sanitization Module: Develop Python logic to identify and remove all on* attributes (e.g., onclick, onerror) from HTML tags.
JavaScript URL Sanitization Module: Develop Python logic to identify and sanitize javascript: and data: URLs containing scripts in href or src attributes.
SVG/MathML Script Injection Prevention: Develop Python logic to detect and neutralize script injection vectors within SVG and MathML elements.
Meta Refresh to JavaScript Prevention: Implement Python logic to prevent meta http-equiv="refresh" directives that redirect to JavaScript.
CSS Expression Neutralization: Develop Python logic to identify and remove expression(...) within inline CSS styles.
Dangerous Element Handling: Implement Python logic to remove or safely sanitize <iframe>, <object>, and <embed> elements.
Payload Encoding Robustness: Ensure the filter handles various encoding schemes (HTML entities, URL encoding, mixed case) for all identified XSS vectors.
Legitimate HTML Preservation: Develop Python logic to ensure that legitimate HTML structures (headings, paragraphs, lists, tables, images, safe links) are preserved.
In-Place File Operation & Basic Validation: Implement the in-place file modification mechanism and conduct basic validation with a few benign and attack files.
